title: Raise coverage for scenario guard and agent risk decisions

sources.reason: Current coverage is 61%; add decision and failure-path tests.
Current coverage is 62%; add malformed and missing-policy tests.
Current coverage is 63%; add unknown, capability, and checkpoint rejection tests.
Raise the regression floors after the new tests establish higher coverage.
This contract declares the coverage uplift scope.

riskAssessment.reason: The change adds tests and raises existing per-file floors without changing runtime behavior.

executionDecision.reason: Coverage tests and threshold changes are implementable within the declared scope.

preReviewWarnings: Review that tests exercise behavior and that raised floors do not mask missing branches.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Agent risk validation reaches at least 65%.
Critical coverage floors are raised to at least 63% for the three modules.
All existing project and governance checks continue to pass.
guidelines: Tests must assert externally visible decision results or error findings.
Coverage thresholds may only be raised after the corresponding coverage report passes.
No production behavior changes are included in this uplift.

intent.problem: Several fail-closed governance decision modules remain near the minimum coverage floor, leaving important rejection and recovery branches weakly protected.
constraints: Raise floors only after fresh coverage evidence.
intent.rationale: Add focused decision-path tests so future governance changes fail loudly in the modules that determine readiness and safety.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
